name: Local Advertising Price Exclusion

eligibility.description: The charge must be separate, intended for reimbursement to the purchaser for local ads naming the article and retail location, and must be refunded within a specific timeframe.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Manufacturers can exclude from the taxable sale price of an article charges for local advertising (radio, TV, newspaper, or outdoor signs) up to 5% of the sales price.
